ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-22-2023 Continued To Mar-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Perotti appeared by zoom for David Jennison, Peter Jennison and Matthew Jennison (executors).

The court noted that a petition for final distribution has not been filed. Mr. Perotti stated that his clients have been involved in a trust administration and that they are preparing to file a petition to terminate the estate proceeding. Status on close of estate is continued to March 22, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-27-2022 Continued To Feb-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-21-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jan-11-2008 is admitted to probate. David Jennison, Matthew Jennison, and Peter Jennison are appointed as Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000 each. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Dec-27-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by Dec-20-2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: D. Xiao. Not reported.
